productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Ferrari LS Weekender Black Duffle Bags
description: Hello, boss? Can't work this weekend. Don't worry, hooky is a breeze with this stylish, roomy overnight bag named ferrari LS Weekender from puma. Head out to anywhere that's not office, and enjoy that off weekday from work. Length: 54 cm Made of high-end polymer with two chambers One main chamber with a zip, slip, and mobile phone pockets Sub chamber on the front with a velcro fastener Handle design with a belt buckle Stitch detailing for enhanced durability Brushed silver hardware, and special motorsport designed zip pullers Ferrari shield and Italian flag label puma Leaping cat logo in metal appliquéd on the front Ferrari Original Logo embroidery on the front pocket Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
